metadata.description: Reusable workflow plugins for GitHub Copilot CLI, including trusted web news, software-team knowledge spaces, life automation starters, plugin authoring starters, and utility skills for safe local-file operations.

plugins.name: trusted-web-news
plugins.description: Aggregates trusted AI and web news and returns a Traditional Chinese briefing with source links.

plugins.name: knowledge-space-starter
plugins.description: Provides reusable software-team agents and skills for discovery, architecture decisions, delivery handoffs, and conversation-to-skill capture.

plugins.name: life-automation-starter
plugins.description: Provides a reusable life-automation agent plus skills for weather, email, calendar, and API-backed workflows.

plugins.name: plugin-authoring-starter
plugins.description: Provides reusable agents and skills for creating Copilot CLI plugins with manifests, marketplace wiring, agents, skills, and MCP setup.

plugins.name: util-skills
plugins.description: Provides utility skills for safe, auditable KeePass operations and for bridging Copilot/OpenCode agent configuration with transparent symlink and wrapper plans.
